name: fw-gear-validated-file-metadata-importer

metadata.name: fw-gear-validated-file-metadata-importer
metadata.summary: Extract metadata of input file to Flywheel.

documentation:
# Validated File metadata importer

`validated-file-metadata-importer` is a Flywheel Gear that imports metadata header of
file and indexes them in Flywheel.

## Documentation

The documentation of the gear can be found
[here](https://flywheel-io.gitlab.io/scientific-solutions/gears/validated/validated-file-metadata-importer/index.html).

## Contributing

Please refer to the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) file for information on how to
contribute to the gear.

modules.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.nifti
documentation: NIfTI parsing module.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.nifti.process
documentation:
Process `file_path` and returns a `FileEntry` and its corresponding meta.

Args:
    file_path (Path-like): Path to input-file.

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary of file attributes to update.
    dict: Dictionary containing the file meta.
    dict: Dictionary containing the qc metrics.

modules.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.derived
documentation: derived module to host source for derived metadata.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.derived.compute_scan_coverage
documentation:
Computes ScanCoverage and Min/Max of Slice location.

Args:
    z_array (list): An array of slice locations.

Returns:
    tuple: A tuple containing the scan coverage, max slice location, and min slice
        location.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.main.project_tag_update
documentation: Helper function to update dicom allow/deny tag list

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.main.run
documentation:
Processes file at file_path.

Args:
    file_type (str): String defining file type.
    file_path (AnyPath): A Path-like to file input.
    project (flywheel.Project): The flywheel project the file is originating
        (Default: None).
    siemens_csa (bool): If True parse Siemens CSA DICOM header (Default: False).
    derived (bool): If True, generate derived metadata (Default: False).

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary of file attributes to update.
    dict: Dictionary containing the file meta.
    dict: Dictionary containing the qc metrics.

documentation: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer module.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.get_startswith_lstrip_dict
documentation: Returns dictionary filtered with keys starting with startswith.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.validate_file
documentation: Returns a list of validation errors if any.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.validate_file_size
documentation: Returns a list of validation errors related to file size.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.sanitize_modality
documentation:
Remove invalid characters in modality.

Args:
    modality (str): Modality string.

Returns:
    str: Sanitized modality string.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.create_metadata
documentation:
Populate .metadata.json.

Args:
    context (GearToolkitContext): The gear context.
    fe (dict): A dictionary containing the file attributes to update.
    meta (MetaData): A MetaData containing the file "metadata"
        (parents container info)
    qc (dict): QC information

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.remove_empty_values
documentation:
Removes empty value in dictionary.

Args:
    d (dict): A dictionary.
    recurse (bool): If true, recurse nested dictionary.

Returns:
    dict: A filtered dictionary.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.decode
documentation: Decode decoded val or hex repr if cannot be decoded.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.util.archived_filetype
documentation:
Return filetype of underlying files

Args:
    fpath (AnyPath): Filepath of archive (must be .zip)

Returns:
    str: Filetype of underlying files in archive

modules.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.parser
documentation: Parser module.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.parser.parse_config
documentation: Parses config.json.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.compute_normal
documentation:
Computes the normal (cross product) of an image orientation vector

Args:
    orientation (ndarray): Vector from image orientation patient (n=6)

Returns:
    ndarray : 3D vector normal to the input orientation

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.compute_axis_from_pair
documentation:
Computes the unit vector connecting p1 to p2

Args:
    p1 (ndarray) : First point
    p2 (ndarray) : 2nd point

Returns:
    ndarray: 3D normalized vector that connects p1 to p2

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.compute_axis_from_origins
documentation:
Compute the axis that connects the first pair of non-degenerate slice locations.

Args:
    position_list (ndarray) : List of image position patient per frame.

Returns:
    ndarray: 3D normalized vector that connects the first non-degenerate pair of
        points.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.compute_slice_locations_from_origins
documentation:
Computes slice positions along an axis connecting a sequence of origins

Args:
    origin_list (ndarray) : List of image position patient per frame
    ortho_axis (ndarray) : Unit vector along which locations are computed
        (may be None)

Returns:
    ndarray: Array of scalar slice positions as dot product of ortho_axis against
        origin_list

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.compute_slice_spacing_from_locations
documentation:
Compute scalar slice spacing from the vector of slice locations.

If the slice spacing is not uniform, None is returned

Args:
    slice_locations (ndarray) : Vector of scalar slice locations (position along
        slice axis)

Returns:
    float: Uniform spacing between locations (None if the spacing is not uniform)

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.is_uniform
documentation:
Returns whether the input array has uniform values within a tolerance

Args:
    v (ndarray) : A vector of dimensionality 1-2
    decimals (int) : Rounding precision of values within the vector

Returns:
    bool: Whether the vector has uniform values within the specified rounding
        precision

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.split_by_geometry
documentation:
Computes a split by the number of "phases" from geometry defined by an array
of slice orientations and origins.

Args:
    orientations (ndarray): Vector from image orientation patient of size n
    origins (ndarray): Vector from image position patient of size n
    max_split (int) : Maximum number of allowed splits (ignored if < 0)

Returns:
    tuple[int,list[int]] : Count of phases and corresponding array mapping
        position in orientations,origins with the phase index

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.split_by_orientation
documentation:
Splits by a change in consecutive orientations

Args:
    orientations (ndarray): Vector from image orientation patient
    max_split (int) : Maximum number of allowed splits (ignored if < 0)

Returns:
    tuple[int, ndarray]: A tuple consisting of two elements:
        - An integer representing the number of phases detected.
        - An ndarray indicating the phase assignment for each orientation value.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.split_by_location
documentation:
Splits by the number of "phases" from an array of slice locations and
returns a vector with the phase index for each location. A phase in this context
refers to a sequence of monotonic slice locations.

Args:
    locations (ndarray): Vector of computed slice locations
    max_split (int) : Maximum number of allowed splits (ignored if < 0)

Returns:
    tuple[int, ndarray]: A tuple consisting of two elements:
        - An integer representing the number of phases detected.
        - An ndarray indicating the phase assignment for each orientation value.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.geometry.compute_affine
documentation:
Computes the affine transform relating a grid to its coordinates (x,y,z)

Args:
    axes (list[list[float]] : Axes along row, col, and slice of grid
    origin (list[float]) : 3D patient origin of grid
    spacing (list[float]) : Spacing along row, col, and slice of grid

Returns:
    ndarray : 4 x 4 matrix used to convert grid to patient coordinates

modules.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom
documentation: Dicom parsing module.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.update_array_tag
documentation:
Update PRIVATE_TAGS and ARRAY_TAGS list.

Args:
    custom_tags (dict): Dictionary of type with key/value of type tag: bool.
        If bool=True, tag is added to PRIVATE_TAGS and ARRAY_TAGS. If bool=False,
        tag is removed from PRIVATE_TAGS and ARRAY_TAGS.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.inspect_file
documentation: Returns the DICOMFindings for the input DICOM instance.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.inspect_collection
documentation: Return list of findings for each Dicom in collection

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_dicom_header
documentation:
Returns a dictionary representation of the dicom header of the DICOM instance.

Args:
    dcm (DICOM): The DICOM instance.
    deny: Deny by VR type as well as file name.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary representation of the dicom header.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.is_keyword_denied
documentation:
Helper function to decide whether or not to deny a keyword from being kept.

Args:
    kw: Input keyword
    deny (bool): Deny by VR type as well as specific keys.

Returns:
    bool: True if value should be removed, False otherwise.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_preamble_dicom_header
documentation:
Returns a representation of the dicom header preamble of the DICOM instance.

Args:
    dcm (DICOM): The DICOM instance.
    deny (bool): Deny by VR type as well as file name.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary representation of the dicom preamble header.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_core_dicom_header
documentation:
Returns a dictionary representation of the dicom header but the preamble.

Args:
    dcm (DICOM): The DICOM instance.
    deny (bool): Deny by VR type as well as file name.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary representation of the dicom header.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_siemens_csa_header
documentation:
Returns a dict containing the Siemens CSA header for image and series.

More on Siemens CSA header at https://nipy.org/nibabel/dicom/siemens_csa.html.

Args:
    dcm (DICOM): The DICOM instance.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary containing the CSA header.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_file_info_header
documentation:
Returns a dictionary representing the header of the DICOM instance.

Args:
    dcm (DICOM): The DICOM instance.
    collection (DICOMCollection or None): A DICOMCollection instance.
    siemens_csa (bool): If true, extracts the Siemens CSA header and stores under
        "csa" key.
    deny: Deny by VR type as well as file name.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary containing the header information.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_file_qc
documentation:
Returns the tracking trace of dcm.

Args:
    dcm (DICOM): The DICOM instance.
    file_path (Path-like): Optional file path

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary containing trace of updated data elements.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.preprocess_input
documentation:
Returns a DICOM and optionally a DICOMCollection if input_file is a zip.

If input_file is a zip archive, returns one a representative zip member.

Args:
    input_file (AnyPath): Path-like object to input file.

Returns:
    DICOM: A representative DICOM File instance.
    DICOMCollection or None: A Collection or None if input_file is not a zip
        archive.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.get_derived_metadata
documentation:
Add derived metadata under 'derived' key.

Args:
    file_ (DICOM): A DICOM instance.
    collection (DICOMCollection): A DICOMCollection instance.
    header (dict): Dictionary computed from get_dicom_array_header

Returns:
    Tuple[dict, list]: A tuple containing the derived metadata and a list of errors.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.validate_geometry
documentation:
Return a string containing the error found or None if none found.

Args:
    iops ():
    ipps (list): A list of ImagePositionPatient values.
    iops (list): A list of ImageOrientationPatient values.
    collection (DICOMCollection): A DICOMCollection instance.

Returns:
    str: The error or None if no error.

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.process
documentation:
Process `file_path` and returns a `FileEntry` and its corresponding meta.

Args:
    input_path (Path-like): Path to input-file.
    siemens_csa (bool): If True, extracts Siemens CSA header (Default: False).

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary of file attributes to update.
    dict: Dictionary containing the file meta.
    dict: Dictionary containing the qc metrics.

classes.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.files.dicom.DICOMFindings
documentation: Class to store findings on dicom file and report on them.

modules.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform
documentation: Module to define imaging 3D geometry and related transforms

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.apply_transform_to_point
documentation:
Apply matrix multiplication to a single 2D or 3D coord and adjust dimensionality
as needed

```
param matrix

4x4 or 3x3 matrix

param coord

3D grid coordinate

type coord

numpy.array or list

return

3D coordinate from multiplication of matrix x coord
```

functions.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.apply_transform_to_points
documentation:
Apply matrix multiplication of matrix x points and adjust dimensionality
as needed

```
param matrix

4x4 or 3x3 matrix

param points

numpy ndarray of shape(n,2) or (n,3) for 2D and 3D respectively

return

ndarray of shape [n,3] representing matrix X points (same shape as points)
```

classes.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Transform

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Transform.__init__
documentation: Forward transform of 3D coord

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Transform.transform_vector
documentation: Forward transform of 3D vector

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Transform.inverse_transform_point
documentation: Backward transform of 3D coord

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Transform.inverse_transform_vector
documentation: Backward transform of 3D vector
Interface for forward and backward transform of 3D points and vectors

classes.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.__init__
documentation: matrix must be a 4x4 numpy array

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.transform_points
documentation:
Apply this transform in the forward direction to an array of points

```
param points

numpy ndarray of shape(n,2) or (n,3) for 2D and 3D respectively

return

ndarray of shape [n,3] after transformation in the forward direction
```

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.inverse_transform_points
documentation:
Apply this transform in the reverse direction to an array of points

```
param points

numpy ndarray of shape(n,2) or (n,3) for 2D and 3D respectively

return

ndarray of shape [n,3] after transformation in the reverse direction
```

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.transform_point
documentation:
Apply this transform in the forward direction to a single coordinate

```
param coord

2D or 3D coordinate that can be a tuple or numpy array

return

ndarray of shape [n,3] after transformation in the forward direction
```
Transform point in forward direction

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.inverse_transform_point
documentation:
Apply this transform in the reverse direction to a single coordinate

```
param coord

2D or 3D coordinate that can be a tuple or numpy array

return

ndarray of shape [n,3] after transformation in the forward direction
```
Transform point in reverse direction

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.transform_vector
documentation:
Apply this transform in the forward direction to a vector

```
param vec3D

3D coordinate representing a vector

return

3D numpy array after forward transformation of the vector
```
Transform vector in forward direction

methods.name: fw_gear_validated_file_metadata_importer.transform.Matrix3DTransform.inverse_transform_vector
documentation:
Apply this transform in the reverse direction to a vector

```
param vec3D

3D coordinate representing a vector

return

3D numpy array after reverse transformation of the vector
```
Transform vector in reverse direction
A transform class for 3D points and vectors using a 4x4 transformation matrix
